title: RGCS run manifest
description: The single provenance anchor for one experimental run (or one shot ensemble acquired under identical settings). Embeds specimen, drive, acquisition, and environment records and lists every data file with sha256. A run without a valid manifest does not exist for analysis purposes.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema set, e.g. '1.0.0'.

session_id.description: Groups runs sharing one calibration/phase-drift budget.

hypothesis_ids.description: ROADMAP_TO_FALSIFICATION.md IDs this run feeds; 'EXPLORATORY' for pre-registered estimation-only branches (water).

operator_id.description: Pseudonymous operator code; needed for operator-replication controls (H-08).

control_role.description: What this run IS in the control matrix. 'active' = specimen + real drive.

scheme.description: e.g. 'condition order drawn from seeded RNG before session'.

blinded.description: True = analyst-facing labels are coded until unblinding (see STATISTICAL_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md section 7).

blind_code.description: Coded label shown to the analyst while blinded.

secondary_specimens.description: e.g. water vessel alongside a crystal, or fixture records.

human_loading.description: Only for human_loading branch. Non-clinical volunteer procedure; ethics review sign-off recorded here is a hard gate.

ethics_review_ref.description: Reference to the ethics/IRB-equivalent approval or documented exemption. Runs without it are excluded.

no_energized_contact_confirmed.description: Must be true: no electrode/coil drive energized during human contact.

participant_code.description: Pseudonymous; no personal data in manifests.

software.description: Name -> version map of acquisition/generation software.

generator_script.description: For synthetic data: the seeded script that produced the files.

synthetic.description: True = simulated data (never enters evidential claims; used for pipeline tests).

reason.description: Must cite a pre-registered exclusion criterion from EXPERIMENT_PROTOCOL.md; post-hoc reasons are non-compliant.

classification_note.description: Reminder of which configuration values are Source claims.
